source: bom_historical_bronze = False
%run "DataHubBatchScripts/DEVELOPMENT_TOOLS/get_feature_flags"

#Imports
import json
from pyspark.sql.functions import hash
from pyspark.sql.functions import col, concat, lit, to_timestamp,current_timestamp,date_format, coalesce
from pyspark.sql.functions import sha2, concat_ws, regexp_replace
from pyspark.sql.types import DecimalType
from pyspark.sql import functions as F
from pyspark.sql.window import Window
from pyspark.sql.types import StructType, StructField, StringType, IntegerType, BooleanType,DateType, DoubleType,TimestampType
from py4j.protocol import Py4JJavaError

#Get Parameter from controldb
db_port = 1433
linked_service_name = "LS_SQL_ELTFrameworkDB"
db_notebookname= "bom_historical_bronze"
linkedServiceProperties = json.loads(mssparkutils.credentials.getPropertiesAll(linked_service_name))
sql_server_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Endpoint')
db_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Database')
#print(linkedServiceProperties)
access_token = mssparkutils.credentials.getConnectionStringOrCreds(linked_service_name)

db_query ="SELECT A.*,B.NotebookParameterId,B.ParameterType,B.Value  FROM [CTL].[CFG_NOTEBOOK] A LEFT JOIN [CTL].[CFG_NOTEBOOK_PARAMETER] B ON A.NotebookId = B.NotebookId"

df = spark.read.format("jdbc") \
    .option("url", "jdbc:sqlserver://%s:%s" % (sql_server_name, db_port)) \
    .option("query", db_query) \
    .option("accessToken", access_token) \
    .option("encrypt", "true") \
    .option("databaseName", db_name) \
    .option("hostNameInCertificate", "*.database.windows.net") \
    .load()

df2 = df.where(df.NotebookPath==db_notebookname)

#display values
display(df)
display(df2)

#Source DataLake storage details
source_storage = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='source_storage').collect()[0]["Value"] #Storage name
source_container = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='source_container').collect()[0]["Value"] #Storage container detail
source_path = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='source_path').collect()[0]["Value"] #internal folder location in container

#Destination DataLake storage details
destination_storage = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='destination_storage').collect()[0]["Value"] #Storage name
destination_container = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='destination_container').collect()[0]["Value"] #raw storage container details
destination_path = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='destination_path').collect()[0]["Value"] #raw delta file patch


#Get Current Date
#Bronze_LoadDate=spark.sql("select current_timestamp()").collect()[0][0]
Date_Collection = spark.sql("select current_timestamp() AS Current,(current_timestamp() + interval '-1' second) AS EndDate").collect()
Bronze_LoadDate = Date_Collection[0]['Current']
Bronze_UpdateEndDate = Date_Collection[0]['EndDate']

print(source_storage)
print(source_container)
print(source_path)
print(destination_storage)
print(destination_container)
print(destination_path)
# Table: bomhistorical: START
#Set table name
db_tablename="bomhistorical"
spark.sql(f"DROP TABLE IF EXISTS {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename}")

base = "abfss://bronze@cqldevdatahubsynapse.dfs.core.windows.net/bom/historical_data/bomhistorical/"
# DANGER: This permanently deletes the folder and everything under it
mssparkutils.fs.rm(base, recurse=True)

print("Deleted:", base)

# Create Bronze Database
spark.sql(f"""CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS {db_notebookname};""")

# Bronze RAW table
spark.sql(f"""
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename}
(
  hd STRING,
  StationNumber STRING,
  StationName STRING,

  Latitude STRING,
  Longitude STRING,
  MSL STRING,

  Year STRING,
  Month STRING,
  Day STRING,
  HH24 STRING,
  Minute STRING,

  Precip10MinMM STRING,
  QualTotPrecip STRING,
  CountTotalPrecipitObserv STRING,

  AirTemperatureDegrees STRING,
  QualAirTemperature STRING,
  AveAirTemperatureDegrees STRING,
  QualAveAirTemperature STRING,
  CountAveAirTemperatureObs STRING,
  HighestAirTemperatureDegrees STRING,
  QualHighestAirTemperature STRING,
  CountHighestAirTemperatureObser STRING,
  LowestAirTemperatureDegrees STRING,
  QualityLowestAirTemperature STRING,
  CountLowestAirTemperatureObserv STRING,

  TemperatureSoil5cmDepthDegrees STRING,
  QualSoilTemperature5cmDepth STRING,
  TemperatureSoil10cmDepthDegrees STRING,
  QualSoilTemperature10cmDepth STRING,
  TemperatureSoil20cmDepthDegrees STRING,
  QualSoilTemperature20cmDepth STRING,
  TemperatureSoil50cmDepthDegrees STRING,
  QualSoilTemperature50cmDepth STRING,
  TemperatureSoil100cmDepthDegrees STRING,
  QualSoilTemperature100cmDepth STRING,

  WetBulbTemperatureDegrees STRING,
  QualWetBulbTemperature STRING,
  HighestWetBulbTemperatureDegrees STRING,
  QualHighestWetBulbObserv STRING,
  CountHighestWetBulbObserv STRING,
  LowestWetBulbTemperatureDegrees STRING,
  QualLowestWetBulbTemp STRING,
  CountLowestWetBulbObserv STRING,

  DewPointTemperatureDegrees STRING,
  QualDewPointTemperature STRING,
  HighestDewPointTemperatureDegrees STRING,
  QualHighestDewPointTemperature STRING,
  CountHighestDewPointObserv STRING,
  LowestDewPointTemperature STRING,
  QualityLowestDewPointTemperature STRING,
  CountLowestDewPointObserv STRING,

  RelativeHumidityPercentage STRING,
  QualityRelativeHumidity STRING,

  VapourPressurehPa STRING,
  QualVapourPressure STRING,
  HighestVapourPressurehPa STRING,
  QualHighestVapourPressure STRING,
  CountHighestVapourPressureObserv STRING,
  LowestVapourPressurehPa STRING,
  QualLowestVapourPressure STRING,
  CountLowestVapourPressureObserv STRING,

  Wind1minuteSpeed STRING,
  Wind1minuteSpeedQuality STRING,
  MinimumWindOver1minuteSpeed STRING,
  MinimumWindOver1minuteSpeedQuality STRING,
  Wind1minuteDirectionDegrees STRING,
  Wind1minuteDirectionQuality STRING,

  AveWindSpeed STRING,
  QualAveWindSpeed STRING,
  CountAveWindSpeedObser STRING,
  HighestWindSpeed STRING,
  QualHighestWindSpeed STRING,
  CountHighestWindSpeedObserv STRING,
  LowestWindSpeed STRING,
  QualLowestWindSpeed STRING,
  CountLowestWindSpeedObserv STRING,

  MaxWindQustOver1minute STRING,
  MaxWindQustOver1minuteQual STRING,

  HeightCloudCeilometerSample1 STRING,
  QualCloudHeightCeilometerSample1 STRING,
  HeightCloudCeilometerSample2 STRING,
  QualCloudHeightCeilometerSample2 STRING,
  HeightCloudCeilometerSample3 STRING,
  QualCloudHeightCeilometerSample3 STRING,
  HeightCloudCeilometerSample4 STRING,
  QualCloudHeightCeilometerSample4 STRING,
  HeightCloudCeilometerSample5 STRING,
  QualCloudHeightCeilometerSample5 STRING,

  CloudAmountLayer130MinuteCeilometer STRING,
  QualCloudAmountLayer130MinuteCeilometer STRING,
  CloudHeightLayer130MinuteCeilometer STRING,
  QualCloudHeightLayer130MinuteCeilometer STRING,

  CloudAmountLayer230MinuteCeilometer STRING,
  QualCloudAmountLayer230MinuteCeilometer STRING,
  CloudHeightLayer230MinuteCeilometer STRING,
  QualCloudHeightLayer230MinuteCeilometer STRING,

  CloudAmountLayer330MinuteCeilometer STRING,
  QualCloudAmountLayer330MinuteCeilometer STRING,
  CloudHeightLayer330MinuteCeilometer STRING,
  QualCloudHeightLayer330MinuteCeilometer STRING,

  TotalAmountCloud STRING,
  QualTotalCloudAmount STRING,

  MeanSeaLevelPressurehPa STRING,
  QualMeanSeaLevelPressure STRING,
  StationLevelPressurehPa STRING,
  QualStationLevelPressure STRING,

  CDCLoadDate TIMESTAMP,
  CDCStartDate TIMESTAMP,
  CDCEndDate TIMESTAMP,
  CDCOps INT,
  CDCCurrentFlag BOOLEAN,
  HashKey STRING,
  HashDiff STRING
)
USING delta
LOCATION 'abfss://{destination_container}@{destination_storage}.dfs.core.windows.net/{destination_path}/{db_tablename}'
# load parquet file as dataframe
raw_df = spark.read.format("parquet").load(f'abfss://{source_container}@{source_storage}.dfs.core.windows.net/{source_path}/')#/{db_tablename}

# Hash Key
def hs(c):
    return coalesce(col(c).cast("string"), lit(""))

# -------------------------
# HashKey
# -------------------------
raw_df = raw_df.withColumn(
    "HashKey",
    sha2(
        concat_ws("||",
            hs("StationNumber"),
            hs("Year"),
            hs("Month"),
            hs("Day"),
            hs("HH24"),
            hs("Minute")
        ),
        256
    )
)

# -------------------------
# HashDiff
# -------------------------
key_cols = {"StationNumber", "Year", "Month", "Day", "HH24", "Minute", "HashKey"}

hashdiff_cols = [c for c in raw_df.columns if c not in key_cols]

raw_df = raw_df.withColumn(
    "HashDiff",
    sha2(concat_ws("||", *[hs(c) for c in hashdiff_cols]), 256)
)

# -------------------------
# CDC Columns
# -------------------------
# Force Spark-compatible timestamps
raw_df = raw_df.withColumn("CDCLoadDate", to_timestamp(lit(Bronze_LoadDate),'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'))
raw_df = raw_df.withColumn("CDCStartDate", to_timestamp(lit(Bronze_LoadDate), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'))
raw_df = raw_df.withColumn("CDCEndDate", to_timestamp(lit("9999-12-31 23:59:59"), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'))
raw_df = raw_df.withColumn("CDCCurrentFlag", lit(1))
raw_df = raw_df.withColumn("CDCOps", lit(1))

# Row count parameters
Bronze_Insert_Pre=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCOps = 1 """).collect()[0][0]
Bronze_Update_Pre=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCOps = 2 """).collect()[0][0]
Bronze_Delete_Pre=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCOps = 0 """).collect()[0][0]

print(Bronze_Insert_Pre)
print(Bronze_Update_Pre)
print(Bronze_Delete_Pre)
print(Bronze_LoadDate)

# Deduplicate to 1 row per HashKey (pick latest observation if duplicates exist)
w = Window.partitionBy("HashKey").orderBy(
    F.col("Year").desc(),
    F.col("Month").desc(),
    F.col("Day").desc(),
    F.col("HH24").desc(),
    F.col("Minute").desc()
)

src_df = (
    raw_df
    .withColumn("rn", F.row_number().over(w))
    .filter(F.col("rn") == 1)
    .drop("rn")
)

src_df.createOrReplaceTempView("temp_table")

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# STEP A — Expire current record when change detected
# (HashKey matches AND current flag is true AND HashDiff differs)
# ------------------------------------------------------------

spark.sql(f"""
MERGE INTO {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} t
USING temp_table s
ON t.HashKey = s.HashKey AND t.CDCCurrentFlag = true
WHEN MATCHED AND t.HashDiff <> s.HashDiff THEN
  UPDATE SET
    t.CDCEndDate = '{Bronze_UpdateEndDate}',
    t.CDCCurrentFlag  = false,
    t.CDCOps          = 2
""")

# ----------------------------------------------------------------
# STEP B — Insert new current record for:
#   - brand-new keys, OR
#   - changed keys (because there is no current row with same HashDiff)
# Unchanged rows will NOT be inserted.
# ----------------------------------------------------------------
spark.sql(f"""
INSERT INTO {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename}
(
  hd,
  StationNumber,
  StationName,
  Latitude,
  Longitude,
  MSL,
  Year,
  Month,
  Day,
  HH24,
  Minute,
  Precip10MinMM,
  QualTotPrecip,
  CountTotalPrecipitObserv,
  AirTemperatureDegrees,
  QualAirTemperature,
  AveAirTemperatureDegrees,
  QualAveAirTemperature,
  CountAveAirTemperatureObs,
  HighestAirTemperatureDegrees,
  QualHighestAirTemperature,
  CountHighestAirTemperatureObser,
  LowestAirTemperatureDegrees,
  QualityLowestAirTemperature,
  CountLowestAirTemperatureObserv,
  TemperatureSoil5cmDepthDegrees,
  QualSoilTemperature5cmDepth,
  TemperatureSoil10cmDepthDegrees,
  QualSoilTemperature10cmDepth,
  TemperatureSoil20cmDepthDegrees,
  QualSoilTemperature20cmDepth,
  TemperatureSoil50cmDepthDegrees,
  QualSoilTemperature50cmDepth,
  TemperatureSoil100cmDepthDegrees,
  QualSoilTemperature100cmDepth,
  WetBulbTemperatureDegrees,
  QualWetBulbTemperature,
  HighestWetBulbTemperatureDegrees,
  QualHighestWetBulbObserv,
  CountHighestWetBulbObserv,
  LowestWetBulbTemperatureDegrees,
  QualLowestWetBulbTemp,
  CountLowestWetBulbObserv,
  DewPointTemperatureDegrees,
  QualDewPointTemperature,
  HighestDewPointTemperatureDegrees,
  QualHighestDewPointTemperature,
  CountHighestDewPointObserv,
  LowestDewPointTemperature,
  QualityLowestDewPointTemperature,
  CountLowestDewPointObserv,
  RelativeHumidityPercentage,
  QualityRelativeHumidity,
  VapourPressurehPa,
  QualVapourPressure,
  HighestVapourPressurehPa,
  QualHighestVapourPressure,
  CountHighestVapourPressureObserv,
  LowestVapourPressurehPa,
  QualLowestVapourPressure,
  CountLowestVapourPressureObserv,
  Wind1minuteSpeed,
  Wind1minuteSpeedQuality,
  MinimumWindOver1minuteSpeed,
  MinimumWindOver1minuteSpeedQuality,
  Wind1minuteDirectionDegrees,
  Wind1minuteDirectionQuality,
  AveWindSpeed,
  QualAveWindSpeed,
  CountAveWindSpeedObser,
  HighestWindSpeed,
  QualHighestWindSpeed,
  CountHighestWindSpeedObserv,
  LowestWindSpeed,
  QualLowestWindSpeed,
  CountLowestWindSpeedObserv,
  MaxWindQustOver1minute,
  MaxWindQustOver1minuteQual,
  HeightCloudCeilometerSample1,
  QualCloudHeightCeilometerSample1,
  HeightCloudCeilometerSample2,
  QualCloudHeightCeilometerSample2,
  HeightCloudCeilometerSample3,
  QualCloudHeightCeilometerSample3,
  HeightCloudCeilometerSample4,
  QualCloudHeightCeilometerSample4,
  HeightCloudCeilometerSample5,
  QualCloudHeightCeilometerSample5,
  CloudAmountLayer130MinuteCeilometer,
  QualCloudAmountLayer130MinuteCeilometer,
  CloudHeightLayer130MinuteCeilometer,
  QualCloudHeightLayer130MinuteCeilometer,
  CloudAmountLayer230MinuteCeilometer,
  QualCloudAmountLayer230MinuteCeilometer,
  CloudHeightLayer230MinuteCeilometer,
  QualCloudHeightLayer230MinuteCeilometer,
  CloudAmountLayer330MinuteCeilometer,
  QualCloudAmountLayer330MinuteCeilometer,
  CloudHeightLayer330MinuteCeilometer,
  QualCloudHeightLayer330MinuteCeilometer,
  TotalAmountCloud,
  QualTotalCloudAmount,
  MeanSeaLevelPressurehPa,
  QualMeanSeaLevelPressure,
  StationLevelPressurehPa,
  QualStationLevelPressure,
  CDCLoadDate,
  CDCStartDate,
  CDCEndDate,
  CDCOps,
  CDCCurrentFlag,
  HashKey,
  HashDiff
)
SELECT
  s.hd,
  s.StationNumber,
  s.StationName,
  s.Latitude,
  s.Longitude,
  s.MSL,
  s.Year,
  s.Month,
  s.Day,
  s.HH24,
  s.Minute,
  s.Precip10MinMM,
  s.QualTotPrecip,
  s.CountTotalPrecipitObserv,
  s.AirTemperatureDegrees,
  s.QualAirTemperature,
  s.AveAirTemperatureDegrees,
  s.QualAveAirTemperature,
  s.CountAveAirTemperatureObs,
  s.HighestAirTemperatureDegrees,
  s.QualHighestAirTemperature,
  s.CountHighestAirTemperatureObser,
  s.LowestAirTemperatureDegrees,
  s.QualityLowestAirTemperature,
  s.CountLowestAirTemperatureObserv,
  s.TemperatureSoil5cmDepthDegrees,
  s.QualSoilTemperature5cmDepth,
  s.TemperatureSoil10cmDepthDegrees,
  s.QualSoilTemperature10cmDepth,
  s.TemperatureSoil20cmDepthDegrees,
  s.QualSoilTemperature20cmDepth,
  s.TemperatureSoil50cmDepthDegrees,
  s.QualSoilTemperature50cmDepth,
  s.TemperatureSoil100cmDepthDegrees,
  s.QualSoilTemperature100cmDepth,
  s.WetBulbTemperatureDegrees,
  s.QualWetBulbTemperature,
  s.HighestWetBulbTemperatureDegrees,
  s.QualHighestWetBulbObserv,
  s.CountHighestWetBulbObserv,
  s.LowestWetBulbTemperatureDegrees,
  s.QualLowestWetBulbTemp,
  s.CountLowestWetBulbObserv,
  s.DewPointTemperatureDegrees,
  s.QualDewPointTemperature,
  s.HighestDewPointTemperatureDegrees,
  s.QualHighestDewPointTemperature,
  s.CountHighestDewPointObserv,
  s.LowestDewPointTemperature,
  s.QualityLowestDewPointTemperature,
  s.CountLowestDewPointObserv,
  s.RelativeHumidityPercentage,
  s.QualityRelativeHumidity,
  s.VapourPressurehPa,
  s.QualVapourPressure,
  s.HighestVapourPressurehPa,
  s.QualHighestVapourPressure,
  s.CountHighestVapourPressureObserv,
  s.LowestVapourPressurehPa,
  s.QualLowestVapourPressure,
  s.CountLowestVapourPressureObserv,
  s.Wind1minuteSpeed,
  s.Wind1minuteSpeedQuality,
  s.MinimumWindOver1minuteSpeed,
  s.MinimumWindOver1minuteSpeedQuality,
  s.Wind1minuteDirectionDegrees,
  s.Wind1minuteDirectionQuality,
  s.AveWindSpeed,
  s.QualAveWindSpeed,
  s.CountAveWindSpeedObser,
  s.HighestWindSpeed,
  s.QualHighestWindSpeed,
  s.CountHighestWindSpeedObserv,
  s.LowestWindSpeed,
  s.QualLowestWindSpeed,
  s.CountLowestWindSpeedObserv,
  s.MaxWindQustOver1minute,
  s.MaxWindQustOver1minuteQual,
  s.HeightCloudCeilometerSample1,
  s.QualCloudHeightCeilometerSample1,
  s.HeightCloudCeilometerSample2,
  s.QualCloudHeightCeilometerSample2,
  s.HeightCloudCeilometerSample3,
  s.QualCloudHeightCeilometerSample3,
  s.HeightCloudCeilometerSample4,
  s.QualCloudHeightCeilometerSample4,
  s.HeightCloudCeilometerSample5,
  s.QualCloudHeightCeilometerSample5,
  s.CloudAmountLayer130MinuteCeilometer,
  s.QualCloudAmountLayer130MinuteCeilometer,
  s.CloudHeightLayer130MinuteCeilometer,
  s.QualCloudHeightLayer130MinuteCeilometer,
  s.CloudAmountLayer230MinuteCeilometer,
  s.QualCloudAmountLayer230MinuteCeilometer,
  s.CloudHeightLayer230MinuteCeilometer,
  s.QualCloudHeightLayer230MinuteCeilometer,
  s.CloudAmountLayer330MinuteCeilometer,
  s.QualCloudAmountLayer330MinuteCeilometer,
  s.CloudHeightLayer330MinuteCeilometer,
  s.QualCloudHeightLayer330MinuteCeilometer,
  s.TotalAmountCloud,
  s.QualTotalCloudAmount,
  s.MeanSeaLevelPressurehPa,
  s.QualMeanSeaLevelPressure,
  s.StationLevelPressurehPa,
  s.QualStationLevelPressure,

  s.CDCLoadDate,
  s.CDCStartDate,
  s.CDCEndDate,
  1 AS CDCOps,
  true AS CDCCurrentFlag,
  s.HashKey,
  s.HashDiff
FROM temp_table s
LEFT ANTI JOIN {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} t
  ON t.HashKey = s.HashKey
 AND t.CDCCurrentFlag = true
 AND t.HashDiff = s.HashDiff

#Row count parameters
Bronze_Insert_Post=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCOps = 1 """).collect()[0][0]
Bronze_Update_Post=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCOps = 2 """).collect()[0][0]
Bronze_Delete_Post=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCOps = 0 """).collect()[0][0]
Bronze_TotalRowCount_Post=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename}""").collect()[0][0]
Bronze_ActiveRecord_Post=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCCurrentFlag = true """).collect()[0][0]

#Row calculation
Bronze_Update = Bronze_Update_Post - Bronze_Update_Pre
Bronze_Insert = (Bronze_Insert_Post - Bronze_Insert_Pre) + Bronze_Update
Bronze_Delete = Bronze_Delete_Post - Bronze_Delete_Pre
Bronze_ActiveRows = Bronze_ActiveRecord_Post 
Bronze_TotalRows = Bronze_TotalRowCount_Post

print(Bronze_Insert)
print(Bronze_Update)
print(Bronze_Delete)
print(Bronze_ActiveRows)
print(Bronze_TotalRows)

log_data = [(db_notebookname,db_tablename,Bronze_LoadDate,Bronze_Insert,Bronze_Update,Bronze_Delete,Bronze_ActiveRows,Bronze_TotalRows)]
print(log_data)
log_columns = ['PIPELINE_NAME', 'TABLE_NAME', 'INGEST_DATETIME', 'INSERT','UPDATE','DELETE','ACTIVE_ROWS','TOTAL_ROWS']
df_log = spark.createDataFrame(log_data, log_columns)

#Write to controldb
db_port = 1433
linked_service_name = "LS_SQL_ELTFrameworkDB"
linkedServiceProperties = json.loads(mssparkutils.credentials.getPropertiesAll(linked_service_name))
sql_server_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Endpoint')
db_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Database')
access_token = mssparkutils.credentials.getConnectionStringOrCreds(linked_service_name)
write_table_name = "[CTL].[CFG_INGESTION_LOGS]"

try:
    df_log.write.format("jdbc") \
        .option("url", "jdbc:sqlserver://%s:%s" % (sql_server_name, db_port)) \
        .option("dbtable", write_table_name) \
        .option("accessToken", access_token) \
        .option("encrypt", "true") \
        .option("databaseName", db_name) \
        .option("hostNameInCertificate", "*.database.windows.net") \
        .mode("append") \
        .save()
except ValueError as error :
    print("MSSQL Connector write failed", error)

print("MSSQL Connector write(append) succeeded  ")
# Table: bomhistorical: END
